title: abies columbaria
intro: Abies columbaria, also known as Fraser fir, is a species of evergreen tree native to the southeastern United States. The resin of the Fraser fir has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Abies columbaria include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Abies columbaria is often used in herbal preparations, including essential oils, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin or inhaled to reap its medicinal benefits.
